response.justification: The candidate is an experienced, versatile senior full-stack developer with strong testing culture and some high-throughput systems exposure, but falls well short of the role's core minimum qualifications. C++ experience amounts to roughly seven months at National Instruments plus a thesis project, versus the required 8 years. The career centers on web/product engineering in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang rather than cloud compute platforms, and there is no demonstrated technical-leadership role owning platform strategy or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers at scale.
strengths: Low-latency, high-throughput systems work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests per second)
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus authored testing libraries and ran workshops
Broad polyglot experience across web, mobile, embedded, and DevOps tooling, including Kubernetes deployments
concerns: Far below the required 8 years of C++ experience (under 1 year professionally)
No production cloud compute platform or large-scale distributed infrastructure ownership
No formal technical-leadership track record leading strategy, priorities, and cross-team alignment
